answer.text: Trading should only occur during high-volume periods
Volume trends should validate price movements — high volume during breakouts adds credibility
Volume is irrelevant in technical analysis

explanation.text: **The Logic:** TA principle: volume confirms price. Rising price with rising volume = strong trend. Rising price with falling volume = weakening trend. Breakouts need volume confirmation. **The Trap:** Volume is very relevant in TA. It validates the conviction behind price movements. **Cross-Exam Context:** Ch 15 NISM XV. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** A breakout above resistance on 2-3x average volume is much more reliable than one on below-average volume.
